channel.title: Categories on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Categories on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Strategy
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Mastering pragmatic execution and market entry by navigating structural friction and strategic bottlenecks.

item.title: Venture Building
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The executive’s guide to Corporate Venture Building: Scaling high-conviction ventures from zero to scale with an unfair corporate advantage.

item.title: Technology
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Beyond the hype: A strategic approach to Corporate Innovation, AI Strategy, and Digital Transformation.

item.title: Fintech
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The intersection of finance and technology: Open Finance, Embedded Finance, and the regulatory landscape of scale.

item.title: Energy Transition
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Navigating the Energy Transition: Sustainability strategy and the long-term capital allocation of infrastructure.

item.title: Essays
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Reflections on business and life: Mental models and the personal philosophy of a strategic executive.

item.title: Leadership
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Leading through change: The executive’s guide to venture leadership and scaling resilient organizations.
